items.text: The average person spends ___ hours per year looking for the TV remote.
Honey never spoils. Archaeologists found edible honey in Egyptian tombs over ___ years old.
A group of flamingos is called a ___.
Bananas are berries, but strawberries are ___.
The shortest war in history lasted ___ minutes.
A snail can sleep for up to ___ years.
The inventor of the Pringles can is buried in one.
Cleopatra lived closer in time to the Moon landing than to the building of the Great Pyramid.
Hot water freezes faster than cold water. Scientists call this the ___ effect.
